name: deliverables
description: Turn an audit's working documents into branded, PDF-ready HTML reports. Renders the deep audit and its companion docs (technical fix checklist, keyword and content plan, backlink and E-E-A-T plan) into clean, print-ready report files using a brand-agnostic template. Prompts for branding (logo, colours, fonts) and falls back to a neutral, unbranded look. Output is one self-contained HTML file per report, A4 portrait, Cmd+P to PDF. Works alongside /audit:deep on any platform.
